name: BeneFactors Ltd
description: BeneFactors is a Rwandan factoring fintech founded in 2017, with over $1m in assets, focusing on SMEs. It buys invoices worth a quarter of a million USD per month and plans regional expansion into Zambia.

# BeneFactors Ltd
**Country:** Rwanda
**City:** Kigali
**Stage:** rev
**Industry:** Financial Services: Fin Tech
<http://www.benefactorsltd.com>
* [](https://twitter.com/@benefactorsltd)
### Our Story
BeneFactors is a Rwandan factoring firm offering unsecured working capital products, for increased SME resilience, growth and job creation
### What problem are we solving
47% of Rwandan SMEs can't access to cash flow services, making it the least-accessed type of financial services, resulting in firm death
### How are we impacting the world
A locally-adapted, tech-enabled factoring product, tailored to the specifics of each firm's cash flow cycle

tavily.answer:
BeneFactors Ltd's official website is https://fintech-consult.com/fintech/benefactors-ltd. It is a Rwandan fintech providing factoring services. Founded in 2017, it focuses on SME finance.
BeneFactors Ltd is a Rwandan fintech providing factoring services to SMEs. Founded in 2017, it won the Seedstars World 2018 Kigali competition. It operates in Kigali, Rwanda.
